title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Newgen Software

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Newgen Software
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Newgen Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About Newgen Software:
Newgen Software is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software!
